rules.name: Commission_Require_Percentage_Or_Amount
rules.description: At least one of CommissionPercentage or CommissionAmount must be set on each line

rules.name: Commission_Percentage_Range
rules.description: CommissionPercentage must be between 0 and 100 when set

rules.name: Commission_Line_Criteria_Check
rules.description: At least one criteria (Product, ProductCategory, or BPGroup) should be set per line
